plugins.name: kickoff
plugins.description: Project state analysis before starting work — real stack vs docs claims, git state, routed findings.

plugins.name: doctos
plugins.description: Documentation hygiene — audits .md files, enforces docs/ structure, archives obsolete docs.

plugins.name: pm-tasks
plugins.description: Task lifecycle — audits TASK_TODO.md, archives completed tasks monthly, scans code TODOs.

plugins.name: standup
plugins.description: Recent-progress report for a project — shipped / in-flight / pendings, internal or client-facing.
